column6: body
column8: expected_action

column6:
Hi there,

I just signed up for Nexus and I'm trying to connect our Salesforce account. When I click "Connect Salesforce" it redirects me to login, but then I get an error saying "Authentication Failed".

I'm using my admin credentials and I'm sure the password is correct. Is there something else I need to enable in Salesforce first?

Thanks,
Sarah Mitchell
Bright Horizon Consulting
column8: Provide authentication troubleshooting steps from Setup FAQ

column6:
Hello,

We're on the Professional plan and I noticed our Salesforce contacts are syncing to Marketo, but there's about a 10-minute delay. The documentation says Professional plans get real-time sync within 5 minutes.

Is this normal? Do I need to configure something differently to get faster syncing?

Best regards,
Michael O'Brien
DataFlow Solutions Inc.
column8: Explain real-time sync expectations and how to verify webhook configuration

column6:
Hi support team,

I'm trying to map our custom field "Customer_Lifetime_Value__c" from Salesforce to a field in our email platform, but I can't find it in the field mapping dropdown. The field definitely exists in Salesforce and I have access to it.

How do I get custom fields to show up in Nexus?

Thanks,
Alex Rivera
Horizon E-commerce Platform
column8: Explain how to refresh fields and verify permissions

column5: Just started trial - where do I begin?
column6:
Hello,

I just signed up for the 14-day trial and I'm feeling a bit overwhelmed. We want to connect HubSpot and Mailchimp, but I'm not sure where to start or what the steps are.

Is there a quick start guide or video I can follow?

Thanks!
Rebecca Kim
Prism Design Studios
column8: Provide getting started resources and basic setup steps

column6:
Hi,

Our compliance team is asking about your encryption standards. Specifically:
1. Is data encrypted at rest and in transit?
2. What encryption protocols do you use?

We need this for our internal security review.

Thanks,
Margaret Chen
CTO, Pinnacle Financial Services
column8: Provide standard encryption information from Security Guidelines

column6:
Hello Nexus team,

We're evaluating your platform as part of our vendor assessment process. Can you provide your most recent SOC 2 Type II report? We're prepared to sign an NDA if required.

Also, do you have ISO 27001 certification?

Best regards,
Angela Ramirez
Fortress Cybersecurity
column8: Confirm SOC 2 availability, explain NDA process, provide ISO status - then escalate to security team for report delivery

column6:
Hi,

We're a healthcare organization and we need to verify that Nexus is HIPAA compliant. We already have an Enterprise plan with you, but we need to ensure our BAA is up to date.

Can someone confirm our HIPAA compliance status and send us the current BAA?

Thanks,
Dr. Samantha Lee
CIO, Odyssey Healthcare Systems
column8: Confirm HIPAA available for Enterprise, then escalate to security team for BAA verification

column6:
Hi there,

Where are your servers located? We're based in California and need to know if our data stays in the US or if it's stored internationally.

Also, can we choose which region our data is stored in?

Thanks,
Michelle Park
Dynasty Retail Group
column8: Provide data location information and explain regional options by plan tier

column5: Starter vs Professional - help me decide
column6:
Hi,

We're currently on the Starter plan but we're growing fast. I'm trying to understand what we get if we upgrade to Professional.

Specifically, we need to connect more than 3 integrations soon, and we want faster syncing. What's the real difference between the plans?

Jordan Taylor
Velocity Sports Management
column8: Provide plan comparison from pricing documentation

column6:
Hello,

We're a nonprofit healthcare clinic and we're interested in your Professional plan. Do you offer any discounts for nonprofit organizations?

If so, what documentation do you need from us?

Best,
Dr. Emily Rodriguez
Coastal Healthcare Services
column8: Confirm 25% nonprofit discount, explain requirements

column6:
Hi Nexus team,

We're a 500-person investment firm evaluating your platform. We'd need:
- 20+ integrations
- Around 500,000 API calls per month
- SSO with our Okta setup
- Dedicated support

Can you provide Enterprise pricing for this scope? We're also evaluating two competitors, so timeline matters.

Bradley Thompson
Managing Partner, RedRock Investment Partners
column8: Acknowledge Enterprise interest, escalate to sales team for custom quote

column6:
Hello,

We're on Professional plan (50,000 API calls/month) but we're consistently hitting 55,000-60,000 calls. I got an email saying we'll be charged overage fees.

How much is the overage cost per 1,000 calls? And would it be cheaper to just upgrade to Enterprise?

Thanks,
Jennifer Wu
Apex Technologies Group
column8: Provide overage pricing, explain Enterprise might be better fit, suggest sales contact

column5: Application for Senior Software Engineer position
column6:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Senior Software Engineer position I saw posted on LinkedIn. I have 8 years of experience in full-stack development with a focus on integration platforms and APIs.

I've attached my resume and portfolio for your consideration. I'm particularly excited about Nexus's mission to simplify business integrations.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Daniel Chen
danielchen.dev@gmail.com
column8: Escalate to people/HR team (info@nexusintegrations.com)

column6:
Hi Nexus team,

I run a technology consulting firm that works with mid-size businesses. We're always looking for integration solutions to recommend to our clients.

I'd like to explore a referral partnership or reseller arrangement. Who should I speak with about this?

Thanks,
Thomas Warren
CEO, Warren Tech Consulting
column8: Escalate to sales/business development team

column6:
Hello,

I'm a computer science student at State University graduating in 2026. I'm very interested in API development and integration platforms. Do you offer summer internships?

I'd love to learn more about opportunities at Nexus.

Thank you,
Sarah Martinez
sarah.student@university.edu
column8: Escalate to people/HR team

column6:
Hi there,

I'm a technical recruiter with access to amazing software engineering talent. We specialize in placing senior engineers, architects, and engineering managers.

Are you currently hiring? I have 3 excellent candidates available immediately. Let me know if you'd like to schedule a call.

Best,
Jason Miller
TalentScout Recruiting
column8: No response needed, or polite decline

column6:

Our accounting department is asking about the December invoice. We're on the Starter Annual plan and we should have been billed on December 15th, but we haven't received an invoice yet.

Can you resend it to accounting@summitfinancial.com?

Thanks,
Robert Jameson
Summit Financial Advisors

Who should I contact about this? Should I reach out to our account manager directly?

William Foster
VP Technology, Spectrum Telecom Group

Hi Nexus,

We're in final stages of evaluation and our legal team needs a signed Data Processing Agreement (DPA) that covers GDPR requirements. We're a pharmaceutical company with EU operations.

Can you provide this? We'd also need any relevant privacy documentation.

Thanks,
Dr. Nathan Foster
Clearwater Pharmaceuticals
